text: One of my second-period guys finally ran a clean bead today — took him three weeks. I almost said something encouraging but he looked so proud I just nodded and moved on.
That's high praise from you lol. What's his name?
Marcus. Good kid, slow hands but he listens. Told him to come in Saturday for extra reps before I remembered Linda and Kevin are coming over for Sunday dinner this weekend.
Good — bring the grandkids by the shop after.
Yeah through Sunday. Kevin wants to catch a Pirates game so now I'm hunting tickets. I miss when my weekends were just errands and bowling.
